/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.4.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/DiskClientApp.dir/DiskClientApp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DiskClientApp.dir/chat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DiskClientApp.dir/login.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DiskClientApp.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DiskClientApp.dir/md5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DiskClientApp.dir/transferpanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DiskClientApp.dir/widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DiskClientApp.dir/client/tcpnet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DiskClientApp.dir/kernel/tcpkernel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DiskClientApp.dir/DiskClientApp_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o DiskClient.app/Contents/MacOS/DiskClient -F/Users/jaegerproxima/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/jaegerproxima/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib /Users/jaegerproxima/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/jaegerproxima/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /Users/jaegerproxima/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/jaegerproxima/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
